notes: Two hardware variants exist: SP (speakON outputs) and BP (binding post outputs); output connector type must be specified at time of order. The operation manual (ManualsLib #290497) and the farralane.com spec listing confirm: 4x balanced XLR-F inputs, 4x Neutrik NL4FC speakON or binding post outputs, 2x EtherCon RJ45 NomadLink network (IN and OUT), 2U rackmount chassis. Power is a captive hardwired cord — CEE7/Schuko (EU, 16A) or NEMA L6-30 twist-lock (US, 30A) — no panel-mount inlet. The 'iec' connector type in the port list is an approximation; the actual physical power connection is a captive cord on both regional versions. The 4-channel model does not have XLR loop-thru outputs (those exist only on 2-channel FP+ models). No USB, RS-232, or other control ports confirmed.

ports.name: Input A
ports.note: Balanced XLR-F, electronically balanced, channel A

ports.name: Input B
ports.note: Balanced XLR-F, electronically balanced, channel B

ports.name: Input C
ports.note: Balanced XLR-F, electronically balanced, channel C

ports.name: Input D
ports.note: Balanced XLR-F, electronically balanced, channel D

ports.name: Output A
ports.note: Neutrik NL4FC speakON on SP variant; binding posts on BP variant (must be specified at order). This port describes the SP variant.

ports.name: Output B
ports.note: Neutrik NL4FC speakON on SP variant; binding posts on BP variant.

ports.name: Output C
ports.note: Neutrik NL4FC speakON on SP variant; binding posts on BP variant.

ports.name: Output D
ports.note: Neutrik NL4FC speakON on SP variant; binding posts on BP variant.

ports.name: NomadLink Network In
ports.note: Neutrik EtherCon-housed RJ45 for NomadLink Ethernet control and monitoring network

ports.name: NomadLink Network Out
ports.note: Neutrik EtherCon-housed RJ45 for NomadLink Ethernet daisy-chain output

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Captive mains cord — 230V CE version uses 16A CEE7/Schuko cord; 115V ETL version uses 30A NEMA L6-30 twist-lock cord. Neither is a panel-mount IEC inlet; 'iec' is the closest available connector type. Actual connector is region-dependent hardwired cord.
